meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Iran’s top university bombed as US, Israel intensify attacks; 34 killed
items.summary: Tehran says it will respond 'in kind' to attacks on its infrastructure, accuses Trump of inciting 'war crimes'.

items.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 38 of US-Israeli attacks?
items.summary: Tensions continue after Trump's threat on Truth Social for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: ‘Cocktail of Hindutva and welfarism’: How Modi’s BJP is wooing Assam voters
items.summary: Party banks on mix of xenophobic anti-Muslim policies and financial aid schemes aimed at women to retain power in state.

items.title: Man City captain Silva to leave Premier League club at season’s end
items.summary: Silva to leave Manchester City after winning the Champions League and six Premier League titles in his nine-year stint.

items.title: Steph Curry returns from injury with 29 points but Warriors lose to Rockets
items.summary: NBA star marks comeback after nine weeks as Houston Rockets beat Golden State Warriors 117-116 in San Francisco.

items.title: A new regional order for the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The GCC and Iran can come up with a new security architecture for the Strait of Hormuz that can give Trump an off-ramp.

items.title: Vietnam’s gig workers slammed by rising fuel costs amid fallout of Iran war
items.summary: Diesel prices have more than doubled in the Southeast Asian nation amid Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Iran war live: Tehran rejects Trump’s Hormuz deadline; 2 killed in Haifa
items.summary: Iranian officials dismiss Trump's ultimatum, condemn latest threats as 'incitement to war crimes'.

items.title: UK police arrest seven protesters near RAF base used by US
items.summary: The activists were protesting the alleged use of the RAF base as a departure point for US aircraft.

items.title: Ukraine and Syria to cooperate on security, Zelenskyy says
items.summary: During a trip to Damascus, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said the two countries agreed to work together.

items.title: Driver faces impaired driving charges after Lao New Year incident
items.summary: A driver in Louisiana US, was charged with impaired driving after plowing into a crowd, injuring at least 15.

items.title: Has the humanitarian crisis in Gaza been ignored?
items.summary: Conditions in Gaza worsen amid the United States-Israel war on Iran.

items.title: Hamas armed wing says disarmament demands not acceptable
items.summary: Spokesperson Abu Obeida says calling for the group's disarmament amounts to an attempt to continue Israel's genocide.

items.title: Israeli air strike hits crowd in Gaza City
items.summary: Several Palestinians were rushed to hospital with severe injuries after an Israeli air strike hit a crowd in Gaza City.

items.title: Hamas armed wing rejects disarmament while Israel continues attacks
items.summary: Hamas’s armed wing says it will not discuss disarmament before Israel fully implements the first phase of ceasefire.

items.title: Is war more profitable than peace? David Keen explains
items.summary: A leading political economist breaks down how war can reward power and be beneficial for profits and political survival.

items.title: Dozens missing after boat carrying migrants capsizes near Libya
items.summary: Dozens of people are missing and at least two confirmed dead after a boat carrying migrants capsized off coast of Libya.

items.title: Trump threatens Iran in expletive-filled social media post
items.summary: Donald Trump unleashed a vulgar online tirade against Iran’s leaders as his deadline for reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Israel continues deadly attacks on Gaza while striking Iran, Lebanon
items.summary: Israel has kept up its attacks on Gaza while striking Iran and Lebanon, killing at least four Palestinians on Sunday.

items.title: Frustration grows as Iran’s wartime internet shutdown breaks grim record
items.summary: Since January, Iran's near total internet blackout has impacted jobs and businesses.

items.title: Video captures Iranian missile striking residential building in Haifa
items.summary: Video captured the moment of a direct hit by an Iranian missile on a residential building in Israel’s Haifa.

items.title: Rodent infestations and attacks spread in Gaza tent camps
items.summary: Rat infestations are spreading through Gaza’s displacement camps, Al Jazeera’s Tareq Abu Azzoum reports.

items.title: ‘Refuse to celebrate’: Christians in Gaza mark sombre Easter amid genocide
items.summary: Christians pray in quiet gatherings to mark the resurrection of Christ while holding on to hope for survival and peace.

items.title: Israeli air strikes, shelling across Lebanon add to rising death toll
items.summary: Widespread Israeli attacks pounded Lebanon from Beirut to Tyre on Sunday, adding to a rising death toll.

items.title: OPEC+ agrees to hike oil output, warns of slow recovery after attacks
items.summary: The rise is largely symbolic as some key members are unable to raise ​production amid the US-Israel war on Iran.
